race.description: Neil Mansell Concrete Qtis 3YO Mdn Hcp
race.comment: GOSSAMER GLOW (12) showed good early muster and fought on to finish second last start over 1000m at Sunshine Coast. Lines up strongly and is ready to get off the mark. LANGDOWN LEGACY (3) returns. Wasn't far away on debut here back in December and looks to have come back in good order, winning his recent trial. Can give this a big shake fresh. REIGN OF DAME (14) is racing well and is close to a win, the latest effort a solid third at this track over 1000m after being prominent from the outset. Not drawn as kindly this time, so will need a touch of luck. HURKLE DURKLE (7) has mixed her form in her debut prep but she's a speedy mare and best is up to the mark. Expect her to spear across from the draw and give backers another sight.
